group.description: Specifies the name of the resource group where the resource will be created. Must be a non-empty string.

name.description: Defines the name of the resource. This value must be unique within the resource group and cannot be left empty.

port.description: Specifies the port number to be used by the resource. Must be a valid integer.

timeouts.description: Optional configuration for operation timeouts. Can include 'create' and 'delete' properties, both of which accept strings in duration format (e.g., '30m').

zone.description: Optional field specifying the availability zone where the resource should be deployed. If omitted, defaults may apply.
